sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Test shrinking Y to see if it shifts position
# Current: Y=42, N=41, S=33, O=42

# Record current Y position
seg = current_frame.segmentation
y_before = None
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'Y' and n['pixels'] > 7:
        b = n['boundary']
        y_before = (min([p[0] for p in b]), max([p[0] for p in b]),
                    min([p[1] for p in b]), max([p[1] for p in b]))
        break

print(f"Y before: rows {y_before[0]}-{y_before[1]}, cols {y_before[2]}-{y_before[3]}")

# Shrink Y by 9
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 57, 'col': 36}], intent='solve')

seg = current_frame.segmentation
y_after = None
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'Y' and n['pixels'] > 7:
        b = n['boundary']
        y_after = (min([p[0] for p in b]), max([p[0] for p in b]),
                   min([p[1] for p in b]), max([p[1] for p in b]))
        print(f"Y after: {n['pixels']}px, rows {y_after[0]}-{y_after[1]}, cols {y_after[2]}-{y_after[3]}")
        break

for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'r' and n['pixels'] == 1:
        b = n['boundary']
        print(f"  red dot at ({b[0][0]}, {b[0][1]})")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
